内科临床推理系统Internal Medicine Clinical Reasoning System

内科临床推理系统Internal Medicine Clinical Reasoning System

不问病名，问气机。搜一个症状、或从下面的病开始，系统一步步带你从主诉推导到病机（升降出入），再到理法方药。Not the disease name, but the qi movement. Search a symptom, or start from a disease below — the system walks you step by step from chief complaint to pathomechanism (ascending, descending, exiting, entering), then to principle, method, formula and medicinal.

病机纲目 · 升降出入六维Pathomechanism Compendium · Six Axes of Qi Movement
从升降出入六维统摄「同一病机下有哪些证、哪些病」。以机统证，纵向织网。From the six axes of qi movement, see "which patterns and which diseases fall under one pathomechanism." Governing patterns by mechanism — weaving vertically.
证型索引 · 一证通多病Pattern Index · One Pattern, Many Diseases
从一个证（如心脾两虚）铺开它能生哪些病、为什么——异病同治的临床推理。横向织网。From one pattern (e.g. dual deficiency of Heart and Spleen), unfold which diseases it can produce and why — the clinical reasoning of "different diseases, same treatment." Weaving horizontally.

怎么用这套系统How to use this system

  • 这里的推导器不问病名，问的是气机。每一步追问都在把你导向病机——用升降出入描述的气机动态；教材证型名只作桥接，常见病名只作参考。病无数而病机有数，病机一致则同法同治。This navigator asks not for the disease name but for the qi movement. Each question steers you toward the pathomechanism — the dynamics of qi described by ascending, descending, exiting and entering. Textbook pattern names serve only as bridges; common disease names, only as reference. Diseases are countless, but pathomechanisms are finite: when the pathomechanism is the same, the treatment is the same.
  • 每步选项按临床常见程度排序，常见的在前——大多数人前两三步就能走对方向。At each step, options are ordered by clinical frequency, the common ones first — most people reach the right direction within the first two or three steps.
  • 没人按固定模式生病。走到任何一步觉得不对，点该步「改选」回退换路；到了终点先看「核对清单」，不符就退回来换一条。推理是可检验、可修正的。No one falls ill by a fixed template. If any step feels wrong, tap "revise" on that step to go back and take another path; at the endpoint, check the "confirmation list" first, and if it does not match, return and try another route. Reasoning is verifiable and correctable.
  • 若几种表现并存，以最早出现、最困扰的那个为主诉入口；走完一条，兼症可再走一条。If several presentations coexist, use the earliest and most distressing one as the chief-complaint entry; once one path is done, concurrent symptoms can be traced along another.
  • 每个病都先有一段「总论」，讲这个病所在系统的Every disease opens with an "Overview," explaining how the system it belongs to runs in its 正常normal状态是怎么运转的——知常才好言变。读懂正常这条链，病的每一种，都不过是链条上某一环的失败。 state — know the normal before speaking of change. Once you grasp this chain of normalcy, every form of the disease is nothing but the failure of one link in the chain.
  • 本系统是理解与学习的工具，不替代面诊与诊疗；文中提示需要专业评估之处，请务必当真。This system is a tool for understanding and study, not a substitute for in-person consultation and treatment. Where the text flags the need for professional evaluation, please take it seriously.
